data.body: S3 (0525) DONE via held-out TDD: failure.py (auto_recheck state machine, handle_ci_fail no-comment strip-all, handle_rebase_conflict record-before-removal, MarkerStore self-invalidating needs_rebase cache, reconcile_on_restart, 404/409 no-op) + WipChain.rechecking flag. 11 tests (2 happy + 9 held-out), full suite 39/39, teeth verified. Committed 642430999, pushed as new change stacked on S2c-fix #588. S3 ACs all codebase-verifiable (no live check) -> closeable vs HEAD after CI Verified+1. Next: S4 (land.py).
